# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- First general instruction
- Second general instruction

## UI Customization
- Replace the visual of the contextual menu with WPF UI.
- Ensure that theme changes affect only the contextual menu and the SettingsWindow, while the primary color affects the FocusBar, menu icons, and Settings details.
- Unify the tray menu with the same WPF menu as the bar.
- Do not redesign the Settings screen beyond the specified changes.
